props.name: onCreate
props.type: (value: string, context: { signal: AbortSignal }) => void | Promise<void>

compositionPolicy.semantics: Preserve the labelled editable combobox, listbox ownership, hidden canonical form value, validation proxy, and reset behavior.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: showCanonicalPreview is independently removable; false removes UI, formatter execution, description relationship, events, and accessibility output. Creation validation and async lifecycle are independent of preview and expose an AbortSignal without owning persistence.
